LED Signal Light.name: ET1-C039
LED Signal Light.description: The lamp head adopts an IP67 full protection rating design, and the back cover battery box adopts an IP65 protection design. The lamp can reliably work in harsh environments. Adopting a modular functional circuit design, it has LG lithium battery charging and discharging protection functions, reliably ensuring the service life of LG lithium batteries. This product has a beautiful appearance, is waterproo
